response.justification: Wei Chen has strong full-stack software engineering experience and demonstrates expertise in performance optimization, system architecture, and hardware-software co-design. However, the resume lacks direct evidence of deep-learning workload optimization, AI accelerator architecture design, or SoC/IP modeling experience required for this principal-level role. Additionally, there is no indication of formal education in a relevant field (e.g., PhD, Master's) or equivalent professional experience to meet the minimum qualifications.
strengths: Extensive experience in system architecture design and hardware-software co-design across diverse projects
Strong background in performance optimization and low-latency systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
Proven track record of contributing to complex technical projects in various domains (embedded systems, real-time applications, and web platforms)
concerns: No clear evidence of direct experience with AI accelerators, deep-learning workload optimization, or SoC/IP modeling
Lacks formal education in a relevant engineering/CS field (only BS in Computer Science and Fine Arts) and does not meet the minimum experience requirement for principal-level roles
No mention of SIMD/MIMD architecture or GPU workload analysis, which are preferred qualifications
